/usr/bin/c++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nanshe-d.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/nanshe-d.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nanshe-d.dir/__/platform/openbsd/OpenBSD_Daemon.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nanshe-d.dir/__/engine/llama/Llama_Engine.cpp.o" -o nanshe-d  /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/src/libllama.a /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/common/libllama-common.a /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/common/libllama-common-base.a /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/ggml/src/libggml.a /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a /home/developer/repos/cpp/salix_nanshe/vendor/llama-cpp/build/ggml/src/libggml-base.a -lpthread -lm -lutil -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/X11R6/lib:/usr/local/lib
